models.candidate_family: one guaranteed slot per label plus frequency-weighted apportionment of extra slots
models.mdl: log2(candidate_count) + log2(number of residual count vectors within observed L1), compared to raw count-vector inventory

pair_label_shuffle_control.description: shuffle original pair-cell labels over fixed 6<->9 orbits, then recompute quotient inventories
